2931797.title: SpongeBob
2931797.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2931872.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2931872.description: Felicity and friends find a magic wand, which they use to make crazy wishes until they can locate the wand's rightful owner. // When Miguel discovers his favorite malt is now on the kids menu, he drinks from The Fountain of Youth to get younger.

2931937.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2931937.description: Bug Felicity discovers her favorite snack has been sabotaged so she takes matters into her own hands by visiting the Snacktory. // The Backwards Bug bites Miguel and Athena, causing them to speak backwards until their friends can find the cure.

2932003.title: Dorg van Dango
2932003.description: Patronella casts a spell and now one can look at Dorg without laughing! // When the gang fakes being sick for a day off, Dorg ends up in the hospital for real! He'll need to bust out and get back to school to find a cure!

2932673.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2932673.description: The penguin's habitat must undergo a serious repair. So Alice calls in Gus, a strong willed contractor. The penguins must stop Gus before he unearths their secret HQ. // When King Julien wishes on the Gimme Gimme Star, he gets more than he asked for.

2932722.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2932722.description: Julien suspects a plot to overthrow or kill him is being orchestrated by Maurice. // Burt discovers a love for painting. He's very talented. Kowalski's blueprints for a quantum accelerator get mixed in with his paintings and end up in the museum.

2932791.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2932791.description: Raph must fight the leaders of the road warrior clans to gain their loyalty, before they face their biggest enemy yet on their way to Oasis.

2932837.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2932837.description: Raphael loses his temper when he is insulted by a New Yorker named Vic. When Vic catches the Turtles on video, the Turtles must get the phone back or risk the possibility of their existence becoming widely known.

2932890.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2932890.description: Timmy's enemies join forces and form the League Of Super Evil Revenge Seekers - L.O.S.E.R.S., for short - in order to annihilate him. And with a Fairy-clipse preventing his fairies from using magic, Timmy is forced to outwit the L.O.S.E.R.S.

2933454.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2933454.description: Timmy likes a new girl at school. He wishes he was 'emo' and stops caring about everything.

2933499.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2933499.description: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's, missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. And the only way to break the curse is to find Mister Whiskers.

2933521.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2933521.description: When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty. But he quickly learns that parenting is a lot harder than he ever imagined.

2933554.title: SpongeBob
2933554.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2933600.title: SpongeBob
2933600.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2934343.title: SpongeBob
2934343.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2934364.title: SpongeBob
2934364.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2934436.title: SpongeBob
2934436.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2934495.title: SpongeBob
2934495.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2935220.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2935220.description: Simon is elected as the school's safety monitor and gets to choose the destination of the family vacation. But when Alvin goofs off at school, he has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention and ruining the family vacation.

2935238.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2935238.description: Fed up with seeing how dependent The Chipmunks have become on their technology, Dave decides to take them camping for a weekend, without electricity, cell service or the Internet.

2935268.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2935268.description: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in a play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. But Alvin scares him so badly, that poor Theodore freezes like a statue. Can Alvin unfreeze Theodore before the big audition?

2935315.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2935315.description: The penguins and lemurs face off in a race. The penguins in a souped-up version of their car and the lemurs in Alice's zoo cart. Winner takes the loser's car!  / Alice gives Rico a tummy-settling medicine just after he swallows a ticking time bomb.

2935405.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2935405.description: As the zoo starts feeding them imitation fish cakes, the penguins take matters into their own flippers and hatch a plan to hijack a fish delivery truck. / During a particularly cold day, the rats show up and challenge the penguins to a hockey match.

2935454.title: The Loud House
2935454.description: Leni goes toe-to-toe with the Mayor in a city-wide Royal Woods election.

2936153.title: The Loud House
2936153.description: Lisa takes over her first-grade classroom and learns that there's more to teaching than just knowing facts.

2936188.title: The Loud House
2936188.description: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform for Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help. // Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

2936274.title: De Casagrandes
2936274.description: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it! // Ronnie Anne and her friends uncover a town mystery: what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart?

2936335.title: De Casagrandes
2936335.description: Carl's love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career. // Frida's art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

2936806.title: SpongeBob
2936806.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2936877.title: SpongeBob
2936877.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2936924.title: SpongeBob
2936924.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2936991.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
2936991.description: While trying to create two identical pieces of popcorn Ray and Henry accidentally bring to life the Popcorn Monster.

2937657.title: Breadwinners
2937657.description: Buckle up, duckies! The rocket van is about to get some sweet mods from ace-mechanic Ketta. // Mold strikes the bread mines, and the only ones who can strike back are TRUE Breadwinners.

2937703.title: Dorg van Dango
2937703.description: When Dorg's mom decides she's sick of Normill, the gang will need to use their powers to stop the family from moving! // When Dorg's left in charge of Voulez and her friends, they catch a glimpse of Jet without a disguise!

2937775.title: Sanjay & Craig
2937775.description: When the kids eat candy that makes good things taste bad forever, they set out on a quest to find an antidote. // A cool bass player who lives in an underground convenience store threatens to break up Sanjay and Craig's friendship.

2937858.title: Sanjay & Craig
2937858.description: Megan disguises herself as a tomboy to unwittingly convince Sanjay to be her partner at a dance competition. // Sanjay, Craig, and Hector con their way into a rad-awesome skate crew.

2938543.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2938543.description: As the zoo starts feeding them imitation fish cakes, the penguins take matters into their own flippers and hatch a plan to hijack a fish delivery truck. / During a particularly cold day, the rats show up and challenge the penguins to a hockey match.

2938592.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2938592.description: Marlene discovers a lost egg, and asks the penguins to care for it and keep it safe. Jealous Julien wants to raise the egg to be his second in command.

2938654.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2938654.description: Leo goes behind Splinter's back when he stages a rescue for Karai, whose desire for revenge against Shredder brings about grave consequences for them all.

2938714.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2938714.description: At home, Mikey always messes things up, but when the Turtles go to the bizarre realm of Dimension X, he's the only one who can figure the place out.

2939414.title: Ollie's Pack
2939414.description: When Cleo's joke bombs in class, she convinces Ollie to use a time reversing monster so she can have a redo. // After watching an Inspector Whale Mysteries cartoon, life imitates 'art' when a monster haunts the new mini putt.

2939505.title: SpongeBob
2939505.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2939580.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
2939580.description: Crane's mom visits the Valley of Peace. Crane reveals to Po that his mom hates Kung Fu so he promised her that he would never have anything to do with it. Crane asks Po and the others to help him keep his secret from his mom.

2940149.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
2940149.description: Self-conscious about his size, Mantis ingests a growth potion that makes him huge. Mantis is initially thrilled with the results, but soon his large size puts the entire village and his friends in grave danger.

2940206.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2940206.description: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her party. But Jeanette is so shy, she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows ALVIN. But his advice embarrasses Brittany to the point where she decides not to invite Jeanette to her party.

2940259.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2940259.description: Needing to find a part time job in order to buy the latest video game, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's baby-sitting job. But Basil is not too thrilled at having Alvin look after him. So he decides to put Alvin through the wringer!

2940284.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2940284.description: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's, missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. And the only way to break the curse is to find Mister Whiskers.

2940305.title: SpongeBob
2940305.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2940912.title: SpongeBob
2940912.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2940984.title: De Casagrandes
2940984.description: The family discovers an amazing tamale cart and tries to keep it a secret from Abuela. // Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction that "love will find her," until it seems to come true.

2941074.title: Huize Herrie
2941074.description: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

2941129.title: The Loud House
2941129.description: When Lana learns her favorite fish are in jeopardy of losing their home to construction she springs into action.

2941781.title: Hier is Pony
2941781.description: Annie and Pony's camping trip is in jeopardy when Pony develops a fear of plants. // Heston loans Annie his brand-new coat on a cold day, but Annie knows it's only a matter of time before Pony ruins it.

2941829.title: SpongeBob
2941829.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2941910.title: SpongeBob
2941910.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2941979.title: SpongeBob
2941979.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2942561.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2942561.description: Raphael loses his temper when he is insulted by a New Yorker named Vic. When Vic catches the Turtles on video, the Turtles must get the phone back or risk the possibility of their existence becoming widely known.

2942630.title: Huize Herrie
2942630.description: Zach and Rusty fake an alien landing that sends the whole town on a hunt for little green men.

2942686.title: The Loud House
2942686.description: Leni goes toe-to-toe with the Mayor in a city-wide Royal Woods election.

2942712.title: Huize Herrie
2942712.description: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

2943394.title: De Casagrandes
2943394.description: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. // Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor!

2943472.title: SpongeBob
2943472.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2943559.title: SpongeBob
2943559.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2944053.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
2944053.description: This episode is continuing the jailbreak from the previous episode. Sokka, Hakoda, Zuko and Suki form a new escape plan, but it is complicated by the arrival of Princess Azula.

2944134.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
2944134.description: Katara and Zuko journey together to find the man responsible for the death of Katara's mother, Kya, who was killed in a Southern Water Tribe raid.

2944227.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2944227.description: Timmy's previous wish for a Planet of Dads backfires when the Dads realize the one thing missing from their lives is Mom, and they come to steal her away! It's up to Timmy and a bumbling 'Real Dad' to thwart the Dads and rescue Mom!

2945017.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2945017.description: Dad forbids Sparky from dating Dinkleberg's new dog. Timmy wishes Dad would like the dog as much as Sparky.

2945034.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
2945034.description: When Taotie tries to destroy the Jade Palace and fails, he is sent to prison while his son, Bian Zao, is left behind with Po, who acts like a big brother to the boy who thinks everything is lame!

2945106.title: Ollie's Pack
2945106.description: Ollie offers a monster realm condiment for his hot dog stand, accidentally causing weird side effects. // Ollie and his classmates go on a camping trip. Ollie uses the pack to avoid roughing it, attracting Andre and Bev.

2945154.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2945154.description: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Is playing dirty the only way to win?

2945183.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2945183.description: Hoping to impress her fashion idol, Brittany takes up painting. But her idol only likes her art after Alvin accidentally ruins it. Now Brittany thinks she's an artist ready for a big exhibition.

2945217.title: The Loud House
2945217.description: Lincoln and his friends try to find another way to school after a run in with the 8th grade bullies on the bus. // Lincoln and Clyde are at odds when they discover there's only room for one of their grandmas at Sunset Canyon.

2945979.title: De Casagrandes
2945979.description: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake. // Ronnie Anne and her skate buddies work together to show their coach that they have what it takes to make a team.

2946047.title: SpongeBob
2946047.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.
